name: @interchain-kit/cosmos-extension-metamask
author: Constructive <developers@constructive.io>
description: interchain-kit wallet connector for cosmos extension metamask

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && (tsc -p tsconfig.json || true) && (tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json || true) && cp ../../LICENSE dist/ && cp package.json dist/ && cp README.md dist/
scripts.build:dev: npm run clean; tsc --declarationMap; tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json; npm run copy
